name: thesis-engine
description: Solo-repo marketplace for the Thesis Engine plugin — a research feeder for vibe-thesis projects. For the aggregated 626Labs marketplace (vibe-cartographer, vibe-doc, vibe-test, vibe-sec, thesis-engine) install estevanhernandez-stack-ed/vibe-plugins instead.

plugins.name: thesis-engine
plugins.description: Research feeder for vibe-thesis projects. Discovers cutting-edge thesis topics, gathers primary sources / opposing positions / methodological precedents across five research axes, and emits research notes + a Pandoc-ready BibTeX bibliography in vibe-thesis-shaped subdirectories ready to drop into ThesisStudio. Optional Smart Brevity blog adapter for BlogStudio.
